item.title: The dark truth about chips
item.description: A science experiment reveals how chips change in a vacuum

media:content.media:title: The dark truth about chips
media:content.media:description: A science experiment reveals how chips change in a vacuum

item.title: How strong are spiders?
item.description: A science experiment explores spider strength and why these tiny creatures can be surprisingly powerful.

media:content.media:title: How strong are spiders?
media:content.media:description: A science experiment explores spider strength and why these tiny creatures can be surprisingly powerful.

item.title: The mysteries of shear-thinning fluids
item.description: I talk about how Newtonian fluids can have an effect similar to the Kaye effect of non-Newtonian fluids.

media:content.media:title: The mysteries of shear-thinning fluids
media:content.media:description: I talk about how Newtonian fluids can have an effect similar to the Kaye effect of non-Newtonian fluids.

item.title: I show you how Mentos is only a catalyst to release CO2
item.description: In this video I show you what happens when you put mentos in coke under oil! Then I actually measure the amount of CO2 that comes off of coke when you put a mentos in it vs when you don't. Is there more CO2 that comes off when you add mentos?

media:content.media:title: I show you how Mentos is only a catalyst to release CO2
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens when you put mentos in coke under oil! Then I actually measure the amount of CO2 that comes off of coke when you put a mentos in it vs when you don't. Is there more CO2 that comes off when you add mentos?

item.title: Don't bring your twinkies to space
item.description: I show you what happens to Twinkies in a vacuum chamber

media:content.media:title: Don't bring your twinkies to space
media:content.media:description: I show you what happens to Twinkies in a vacuum chamber

item.title: What happens when a magnet meets frozen aluminum?
item.description: Today, I'm going to be showing you an awesome demonstration of Eddy Currents with my giant neodymium magnet and a huge chunk of aluminum.

media:content.media:title: What happens when a magnet meets frozen aluminum?
media:content.media:description: Today, I'm going to be showing you an awesome demonstration of Eddy Currents with my giant neodymium magnet and a huge chunk of aluminum.

item.title: Floating tables holding weights
item.description: I talk about tensegrity structures and show them in action

media:content.media:title: Floating tables holding weights
media:content.media:description: I talk about tensegrity structures and show them in action

item.title: Can a single strand of silk hold up more weight than metal?
item.description: In this video I test if spider silk is actually stronger than steel! I do a real life experiment with spider silk and steel wire to see which can hold more weight.

media:content.media:title: Can a single strand of silk hold up more weight than metal?
media:content.media:description: In this video I test if spider silk is actually stronger than steel! I do a real life experiment with spider silk and steel wire to see which can hold more weight.

item.title: Is this what caused the Challenger to blow?
item.description: A science-focused look at a possible cause behind the Challenger disaster

media:content.media:title: Is this what caused the Challenger to blow?
media:content.media:description: A science-focused look at a possible cause behind the Challenger disaster

item.title: The world's biggest water drops
item.description: I show you how to make giant water drops in the sink

media:content.media:title: The world's biggest water drops
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make giant water drops in the sink

item.title: Making impossible paint
item.description: I made paint that is dark when the lights are on and light when the lights are off

media:content.media:title: Making impossible paint
media:content.media:description: I made paint that is dark when the lights are on and light when the lights are off
